stemHtml:
An aircraft is flying from A to B. The true course according to the flight log is 090°, the estimated wind is 225°T/20 kt and the TAS is 110 kt.

After 15 minutes of flying with the planned TAS and TH the aircraft is 4 NM north of the intended track and 3 NM ahead of the dead reckoning position.The Track angle error TKE is…
